papers.title: Scaling Laws for Neural Language Models
papers.subtitle: Kaplan et al., OpenAI, 2020
papers.tldr: 语言模型损失随参数量、数据量、算力呈幂律下降；固定算力下应优先放大模型并早停。

papers.title: Training Compute-Optimal Large Language Models
papers.subtitle: Hoffmann et al., DeepMind, 2022
papers.tldr: Chinchilla 重新估计算力最优缩放：模型参数和训练 token 应近似等比例增长。

papers.title: Outrageously Large Neural Networks
papers.subtitle: Shazeer et al., Google Brain, 2017
papers.tldr: 稀疏门控 MoE 让模型拥有巨大总参数量，但每个输入只激活少数专家。
